description_long: This house features a long rectangular structure with a red-tiled gable roof and a prominent white facade. The front includes an arched entryway supported by columns, with a covered porch and multiple windows, some with decorative trim. A striking geometric pyramid structure is attached to one side, adding a unique architectural element. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, except for the porch area. Windows are arranged in a row along the side, providing ample natural light. The overall design blends Mediterranean influences with modern geometric forms.
description: A white house with a red-tiled gable roof, arched front porch, and a distinctive attached pyramid structure, featuring rows of windows and clean lines.
description_view_0: The front view shows the arched entryway, columned porch, and main facade with decorative windows and the red-tiled roof.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the row of windows beneath the roof and the full profile of the attached pyramid structure.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the geometric pyramid and the length of the house, with minimal window detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the long, plain white wall, the red-tiled roof, and a small arched entry at the far end.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main entry with covered porch, columns, and decorative trim
